title: heliophila biseriata
intro: Heliophila biseriata, also known as the double-lined heliophila, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heliophila biseriata include reducing inflammation and fever, as well as treating various infections and skin conditions. It is typically prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and can also be applied topically to the skin in the form of a poultice or cream.
